response.overview: Imran Sheikh is a man of dual identities, maintaining a polished, gentlemanly image in public while harboring a volatile nature behind closed doors. His wife, Nusrat, finds herself trapped in a cycle of constant adaptation, struggling to satisfy his increasingly unpredictable and suffocating demands. Despite the growing emotional toll, she remains dedicated to saving their crumbling marriage through sheer endurance. However, her efforts to maintain peace eventually reach a breaking point as the domestic friction escalates. What began as a desperate attempt at harmony soon spirals into a dark and dangerous reality, as things take a sudden, ugly turn.
response.title: Sahan
